justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for an appointment "tomorrow around 9am" and proposed an available slot for June 2nd from 9:00 AM to 10:00 AM.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly confirming and booking the requested appointment, leading to a positive customer experience.
